metadata.description: PsyReaSFX is a high-performance sound asset browser, audition, waveform, metadata, region, collection, REAPER insertion, and Transfer workflow.

version.name: 0.7.3-beta.4
version.author: Psysia
version.changelog: - Creates named empty logical libraries before any source folder is attached. - Displays Duration as fixed MM:SS.mmm timecode. - Uses indexed directory scanning and known-root propagation for large imports. - Defers result/count rebuilds and batches multi-folder library-map updates.
